title: MEA Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
shortInfo: The latest Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Consultant in PP&R Division posts! Published on the official website, this new recruitment drive offers 2 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the age group of 23 to 35 years and possessing a Post Graduate degree with specialized domain knowledge in International Affairs/Public Policy, strong writing and presentation skills, and experience in reputed universities, think-tanks, or research organizations are eligible to apply online or offline. The application process will be active until 01 June

basic_details.short_information: The latest Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Consultant in PP&R Division posts! Published on the official website, this new recruitment drive offers 2 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the age group of 23 to 35 years and possessing a Post Graduate degree with specialized domain knowledge in International Affairs/Public Policy, strong writing and presentation skills, and experience in reputed universities, think-tanks, or research organizations are eligible to apply online or offline. The application process will be active until 01 June

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 23 years Maximum Age: 35 years

qualification.details: Indian national Post Graduate from a recognized university in India or abroad Specialized domain knowledge/evidence of original thinking/evidence of content writing-peer-reviewed publications, journals, newspapers/media reports/experience of work in a reputed university, think-tank or research organization in the area of International Affairs/Public Policy Evidence of wide-ranging experience in writing and presentation skills

salary_details.details: Remuneration package will be commensurate with the experience and profile of the selected candidate, subject to a maximum of Rs.10 lakh per annum and deduction of applicable taxes. The amount of consultancy fee so fixed shall remain unchanged during the term of engagement.

selection_process: Review of applications Shortlisting for interview / written test Interview / Written Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MEA Consultant in PP&R Division Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: mea.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 01-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MEA Consultant position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Consultant in PP&R Division post at the Ministry of External Affairs is June 1, 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum and maximum age requirements for this role?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Consultant position must be between 23 and 35 years of age. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules, so it's advisable to check the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant role?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification for this position is a Post Graduate degree from a recognized university. Specialized domain knowledge in International Affairs or Public Policy is also essential.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Consultant in PP&R Division post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a remuneration package commensurate with their experience, with a maximum salary of Rs. 10 lakh per annum. Applicable taxes will be deducted.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Consultant in PP&R Division post at the Ministry of External Affairs. These positions are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications can be submitted through both Offline mode (registered post) and Online mode (email). Detailed instructions for both methods are provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What documents need to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested copies of documents supporting your educational qualifications and experience in government service. This may include degree certificates and relevant work experience proofs.

faq.question: Q8. Where should I send the offline application?
faq.answer: Offline applications should be sent by registered post to: Under Secretary (PF&PG), Ministry of External Affairs, Room No. 4071, Jawaharlal Nehru Bhawan, 23-D, Janpath, New Delhi-110011. Ensure the envelope is clearly labeled.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Consultant role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a review of applications, followed by shortlisting for an interview or written test. The final selection will be based on the performance in the interview or written test.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for the Consultant in PP&R Division recruitment. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the MEA Consultant position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Consultant in PP&R Division post at the Ministry of External Affairs is June 1, 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.
